SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Admin
System administrator.
Attendance
Attendance record for one student in one course lesson/session.
Book
 
BookRequest
 
CitationFormat
Output format for research paper citations
ComplaintUrgency
Urgency levels for teacher complaints to the dean
Course
University course.
CourseFailLimitException
Thrown when a student tries to retake a course they have already failed 3 times.
CourseType
Major, Minor, Free Elective course types
CreditOverFlow
Thrown when a course registration violates credit or availability rules.
Database
Central persistence and in-memory storage component for the university system.
Degree
 
Employee
Abstract superclass for all employees.
Faculty
 
File
Course material file metadata posted by a teacher.
GPASorter
Sorts students by GPA descending (highest first)
Grade
 
GraduateStudent
Graduate student model for master and PhD students.
I18n
Internationalization helper.
Language
Switching between languages: KZ, EN, RU
Lesson
A single lesson session.
LessonType
Lesson types: lecture or practice
Librarian
Library staff.
LowHIndexException
Thrown when a supervisor is assigned whose h-index is below 3.
MainController
Console entry point and role-based menu controller.
Manager
University manager role for academic operations.
Managers
 
Mark
Assessment result for one student in one course.
Message
Official internal message between university employees or system users.
NameComparator
Sorts Users alphabetically A→Z by name (FIXED: was reversed Z→A)
News
University news item with optional comments and topic-based priority.
NotAResearcherException
Thrown when a non-researcher tries to join a ResearchProject.
PaperComparators
Strategy collection for sorting research papers.
Reportable
Contract for classes that can generate text reports.
RequestStatus
Status lifecycle for tech support requests
Researcher
Standalone research employee who is not necessarily a teacher or student.
ResearcherMixin
Composition component that provides reusable researcher capabilities.
ResearchPaper
Research publication model used by researchers, projects, and journals.
ResearchProject
Research project containing a topic, published papers, and researcher participants.
Status
 
StatusComparator
Sorts teachers by status (PROFESSOR first)
Student
General bachelor student model with academic, registration, library, and optional researcher behavior.
StudentOrganization
A student organization (club, society, etc.).
Subscribable
Observer contract for users that can subscribe to university journals.
Teacher
Teacher role responsible for course materials, marks, complaints, attendance, and student information.
TechRequest
Technical support request, such as fixing a projector or printer.
TechSupportSpecialist
Tech support specialist handles TechRequests.
Transcript
Simple transcript entry containing a course and GPA value.
UniversityJournal
University research journal acting as the subject in the Observer pattern.
User
Base class for all authenticated users in the university system.
UserFactory
Factory for creating concrete User subclasses.
UserFactory.UserType
 
UserNotExists
Thrown when an operation references a user that does not exist.
